states.name: Dark Lancelot
states.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
states.description: When the power of the Last Faerie of Avalon warped Lancelot's soul, her preferences were completely reversed. She started inflicting pain just as enthusiastically as she had once sought it.

states.name: Dark Lancelot
states.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
states.description:
Faces contorted in pain, voices begging for mercy, limbs shaking with fear—it all brought the new Lancelot pleasure. But whatever was left of the old her still screamed somewhere within her.
"Stop it! This is not who we are! We should be on the receiving end of thiiis!"

states.name: Dark Lancelot
states.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
states.description:
You'd think some event from her childhood must have made her enjoy pain...and you'd be wrong. She was just born this way.
A genuine, natural pervert.
